studyName: NCI SEER Formalin Fixed Paraffin Embedded (FFPE) Tissue Feasibility Study

tables.description: This sample attributes table contains sample IDs, body type, analyte type, tumor status, histological type, primary tumor, metastasis, or transformed cell line, primary tumor location, and name of the center which conducted sequencing.

variables.name: BODY_SITE
variables.description: Body site where sample was collected

variables.name: HISTOLOGICAL_TYPE
variables.description: Cell or tissue type or subtype of sample

variables.name: PRIMARY_METASTATIC_TUMOR
variables.description: Primary tumor, metastasis, or transformed cell line

variables.name: SEQUENCING_CENTER
variables.description: Name of the center which conducted sequencing

tables.description: The subject consent file includes subject IDs, consent information, subject aliases, and case control status of the subject for ovarian adenocarcinomas.

variables.name: AFFECTION_STATUS
variables.description: Case control status of the subject for ovarian adenocarcinomas

variables.name: CONSENT
variables.description: Consent group as determined by DAC

variables.name: SOURCE_SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID used in the Source Repository

tables.description: This data table contains a mapping of study subject IDs to sample IDs. Samples are the final preps submitted for genotyping, sequencing, and/or expression data. For example, if one patient (subject ID) gave one sample, and that sample was processed differently to generate 2 sequencing runs, there would be two rows, both using the same subject ID, but having 2 unique sample IDs. The data table also includes sample aliases and sample use.

variables.name: SAMPLE_USE
variables.description: Sample use. Seq_DNA_SNP: SNP genotypes derived from sequence data; Seq_DNA_WholeExome: Whole exome sequencing; Seq_RNA: Whole transcriptome sequencing

variables.name: SOURCE_SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Sample ID used in the Source Repository

tables.description: This subject phenotype table contains subject IDs, age, and sex.
